channel.title: Blog on Heroic Tales
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Heroic Tales

item.title: Special Memorial Day Weekend Update
item.description: Version 1.1.0 marks the first revision to the rules since the first release. It adds a concrete advancement system and clarifies language around the results of a roll.

item.title: Core Rules Version 1.0.1
item.description: The English and Spanish versions of the Core Rules have been updated to 1.0.1.

item.title: Core Rules en Español
item.description: Thanks to a wonderful community member, the Heroic Tales Core Rules are now available en Español!

item.title: Heroic Tales v 1.0.0! (Super Snow Day Early Release)
item.description: After rounds of play testing, feedback, and revision, I’m happy to report that Heroic Tales, the genre-neutral, rules-light, role-playing game is now ready for official release.

item.title: Community Updates
item.description: I’d love to see the audience using Heroic Tales grow, as I think this can be a vibrant, creative, and supportive community.

item.title: Powered By Heroic Tales
item.description: Heroic Tales is designed to be reused, remixed, and republished. It is published under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 license, which gives you the right to use as many or as few of the concepts and words as you’d like in your own games, settings, adventures, and other content, as long as you make a clear statement that your material is based on this material.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Welcome to the Heroic Tales website! I didn’t set out to write a new system, but I’m pretty happy with how it turned out.
